requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Georgia national energy programmes / EU energy-labelling approximation)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——家用制冷器具（格鲁吉亚国家能源计划／欧盟能效标识趋同）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——家用製冷器具（喬治亞國家能源計畫／歐盟能效標識趨同）

summary.en: Georgia operates national energy-efficiency programmes for appliances that are aligning toward the EU energy-labelling and ecodesign methodology under the EU-Georgia DCFTA approximation commitments. Georgia adopted an Energy Efficiency Law and supporting secondary legislation establishing minimum energy performance and labelling arrangements for energy-related products, with implementation progressing in line with EU directives and the Energy Community framework. For household refrigerating appliances this points toward the EU energy-label A-to-G classes, an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) calculated from rated volume, compartment type and climate class, annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), noise class, and measurement to the IEC 62552 series. Exact thresholds, the label rollout timetable, and whether registration in an EU-style product database is required should be confirmed against the current Georgian secondary legislation and GEOSTM/energy-agency guidance, as the regime is in active transition.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚为器具实施国家能效计划，并在欧盟—格鲁吉亚DCFTA趋同承诺下向欧盟能效标识及生态设计方法对齐。格鲁吉亚通过了《能源效率法》及配套二级立法，为能源相关产品建立最低能效与标识安排，其实施按欧盟指令及能源共同体框架推进。就家用制冷器具而言，这指向欧盟能效标签A至G等级、依据额定容积／隔间类型／气候等级计算的能效指数（EEI）、年耗电量（千瓦时／年）、噪声等级，以及依据IEC 62552系列的测量。具体门槛值、标签推行时间表，以及是否须在欧盟式产品数据库登记，应对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法及GEOSTM／能源主管机构指引确认，因该制度正处于积极过渡中。
summary.zht: 喬治亞為器具實施國家能效計畫，並在歐盟—喬治亞DCFTA趨同承諾下向歐盟能效標識及生態設計方法對齊。喬治亞通過了《能源效率法》及配套二級立法，為能源相關產品建立最低能效與標識安排，其實施按歐盟指令及能源共同體框架推進。就家用製冷器具而言，這指向歐盟能效標籤A至G等級、依據額定容積／隔間類型／氣候等級計算的能效指數（EEI）、年耗電量（千瓦時／年）、噪聲等級，以及依據IEC 62552系列的測量。具體門檻值、標籤推行時間表，以及是否須在歐盟式產品數據庫登記，應對照現行喬治亞二級立法及GEOSTM／能源主管機構指引確認，因該制度正處於積極過渡中。

standards_or_laws: Law of Georgia on Energy Efficiency — national framework for minimum energy performance of energy-related products
Georgia energy-labelling secondary legislation (approximating EU energy-labelling and ecodesign methodology under DCFTA)
Energy Community / EU-Georgia Association Agreement — energy-efficiency approximation obligations
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for EU-aligned EEI)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR. The GB 12021.2 grade framework uses a different EEI calculation basis and grade structure than the EU A-to-G methodology that Georgia is approximating, so a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not map directly to an EU-style class.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性，由SAMR执行，中国能效标识由NDRC／SAMR管理。GB 12021.2等级框架所用的EEI计算基准及等级结构与格鲁吉亚正趋同的欧盟A至G方法不同，故中国1级或2级评定不可直接对应欧盟式等级。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性，由SAMR執行，中國能效標識由NDRC／SAMR管理。GB 12021.2等級框架所用的EEI計算基準及等級結構與喬治亞正趨同的歐盟A至G方法不同，故中國1級或2級評定不可直接對應歐盟式等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two main gaps: (1) Different methodology — China's GB 12021.2 grade framework and annual-consumption limits do not map to the EU-style EEI and A-to-G class that Georgia's programmes are approximating; an EEI recalculation to the EU-aligned method (based on rated volume, compartment type, and climate class) is generally needed, using IEC 62552 measurement data. A Chinese Grade 1 rating is not a guarantee of meeting any Georgian/EU-aligned threshold without recalculation. (2) Transition uncertainty — the exact Georgian minimum energy performance thresholds, the label rollout date, and any product-database registration obligation are still being phased in under DCFTA approximation; these must be confirmed against current Georgian secondary legislation rather than assumed identical to the EU. Because GB/T 8059 already aligns with IEC 62552, much underlying Chinese test data can be reused for the EU-aligned EEI calculation.
gap.zh: 两大差距：（1）方法不同——中国GB 12021.2等级框架及年耗电量限值不对应格鲁吉亚计划所趋同的欧盟式EEI及A至G等级；一般须使用IEC 62552测量数据，按欧盟对齐方法（基于额定容积、隔间类型及气候等级）重新计算EEI。中国1级评定在未重新计算前不保证满足任何格鲁吉亚／欧盟对齐门槛。（2）过渡不确定性——格鲁吉亚的具体最低能效门槛、标签推行日期及任何产品数据库登记义务仍在DCFTA趋同下分阶段实施；须对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法确认，不得假定与欧盟完全相同。由于GB/T 8059已与IEC 62552对齐，大量中国底层检测数据可用于欧盟对齐的EEI计算。
gap.zht: 兩大差距：（1）方法不同——中國GB 12021.2等級框架及年耗電量限值不對應喬治亞計畫所趨同的歐盟式EEI及A至G等級；一般須使用IEC 62552測量數據，按歐盟對齊方法（基於額定容積、隔間類型及氣候等級）重新計算EEI。中國1級評定在未重新計算前不保證滿足任何喬治亞／歐盟對齊門檻。（2）過渡不確定性——喬治亞的具體最低能效門檻、標籤推行日期及任何產品數據庫登記義務仍在DCFTA趨同下分階段實施；須對照現行喬治亞二級立法確認，不得假定與歐盟完全相同。由於GB/T 8059已與IEC 62552對齊，大量中國底層檢測數據可用於歐盟對齊的EEI計算。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in force — Georgia's energy-efficiency programmes set minimum energy performance and labelling for refrigerating appliances under the Energy Efficiency Law and EU-approximated secondary legislation; exact thresholds and rollout dates are in transition and must be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia's appliance energy-efficiency programmes are approximating the EU energy-label and ecodesign methodology under the DCFTA. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map directly to an EU-style EEI/A-to-G class, so an EEI recalculation using IEC 62552 data is generally required. Exact Georgian thresholds, label rollout, and any product-database registration are still phasing in — confirm against current Georgian secondary legislation before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚的器具能效计划正在DCFTA下向欧盟能效标签及生态设计方法趋同。中国GB 12021.2等级不可直接对应欧盟式EEI／A至G等级，故一般须用IEC 62552数据重新计算EEI。格鲁吉亚的具体门槛、标签推行及任何产品数据库登记仍在分阶段实施——投放市场前请对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞的器具能效計畫正在DCFTA下向歐盟能效標籤及生態設計方法趨同。中國GB 12021.2等級不可直接對應歐盟式EEI／A至G等級，故一般須用IEC 62552數據重新計算EEI。喬治亞的具體門檻、標籤推行及任何產品數據庫登記仍在分階段實施——投放市場前請對照現行喬治亞二級立法確認。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Georgia appliance energy label (EU-aligned A-to-G label approximation)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——格鲁吉亚器具能效标签（欧盟对齐A至G标签趋同）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——喬治亞器具能效標籤（歐盟對齊A至G標籤趨同）

summary.en: As part of its EU approximation, Georgia is introducing appliance energy-labelling requirements modelled on the EU Energy Label. For household refrigerating appliances this points toward a label that displays the energy efficiency class (A-to-G rescaled format), annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), noise class and level, and total volume of each compartment type, with the underlying data measured to the IEC 62552 series. Suppliers and dealers would be expected to make the label available at point of sale and in listings. The precise label format, the language requirement (Georgian), the entry-into-force date for refrigerators, and whether a product-database registration analogous to the EU EPREL is operative in Georgia should be verified against current Georgian secondary legislation and the responsible energy/standards agency, since the labelling regime is being phased in.
summary.zh: 作为欧盟趋同的一部分，格鲁吉亚正引入以欧盟能效标签为蓝本的器具能效标识要求。就家用制冷器具而言，这指向一份显示能效等级（A至G重新评级格式）、年耗电量（千瓦时／年）、噪声等级及噪声值、各类隔间总容积的标签，其底层数据依据IEC 62552系列测量。供应商及经销商应在销售点及商品列表中提供该标签。具体标签格式、语言要求（格鲁吉亚语）、电冰箱适用的生效日期，以及格鲁吉亚是否运行类似欧盟EPREL的产品数据库登记，应对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法及主管能源／标准机构核实，因标识制度正在分阶段实施。
summary.zht: 作為歐盟趨同的一部分，喬治亞正引入以歐盟能效標籤為藍本的器具能效標識要求。就家用製冷器具而言，這指向一份顯示能效等級（A至G重新評級格式）、年耗電量（千瓦時／年）、噪聲等級及噪聲值、各類隔間總容積的標籤，其底層數據依據IEC 62552系列測量。供應商及經銷商應在銷售點及商品列表中提供該標籤。具體標籤格式、語言要求（喬治亞語）、電冰箱適用的生效日期，以及喬治亞是否運行類似歐盟EPREL的產品數據庫登記，應對照現行喬治亞二級立法及主管能源／標準機構核實，因標識制度正在分階段實施。

standards_or_laws: Georgia energy-labelling secondary legislation (approximating the EU Energy Label framework under DCFTA)
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — energy-labelling approximation obligations
IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for declared energy and volume parameters

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no EPREL-style pre-registration database. The Chinese 1-to-5 label and the EU-aligned A-to-G label Georgia is adopting are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC／SAMR，2016年修订），展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC／SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无EPREL式预注册数据库。中国1至5级标签与格鲁吉亚正采纳的欧盟对齐A至G标签结构不同，未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC／SAMR，2016年修訂），展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC／SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無EPREL式預登記數據庫。中國1至5級標籤與喬治亞正採納的歐盟對齊A至G標籤結構不同，未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label cannot serve as the Georgian/EU-aligned A-to-G label: (1) Label conversion — an EU-aligned A-to-G label must be produced from an EEI recalculated to the EU-aligned method (IEC 62552 data), with Georgian-language content; the Chinese CEL must be replaced or supplemented, not reused. (2) Registration uncertainty — whether Georgia operates an EPREL-style product-database registration as a hard pre-market gate, and from what date for refrigerators, must be confirmed against current Georgian secondary legislation, since the labelling regime is being phased in under DCFTA approximation. Manufacturers should confirm the operative label format, language, entry-into-force date, and any registration database with the responsible Georgian energy/standards agency before market placement.
gap.zh: 中国1至5级能效标识不能充当格鲁吉亚／欧盟对齐的A至G标签：（1）标签转换——欧盟对齐的A至G标签须基于按欧盟对齐方法（IEC 62552数据）重新计算的EEI生成，并采用格鲁吉亚语内容；中国能效标识须被替换或补充，不可复用。（2）登记不确定性——格鲁吉亚是否运行作为强制上市前门槛的EPREL式产品数据库登记、及电冰箱自何日起适用，须对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法确认，因标识制度正在DCFTA趋同下分阶段实施。制造商应在投放市场前向主管的格鲁吉亚能源／标准机构确认生效的标签格式、语言、生效日期及任何登记数据库。
gap.zht: 中國1至5級能效標識不能充當喬治亞／歐盟對齊的A至G標籤：（1）標籤轉換——歐盟對齊的A至G標籤須基於按歐盟對齊方法（IEC 62552數據）重新計算的EEI生成，並採用喬治亞語內容；中國能效標識須被替換或補充，不可複用。（2）登記不確定性——喬治亞是否運行作為強制上市前門檻的EPREL式產品數據庫登記、及電冰箱自何日起適用，須對照現行喬治亞二級立法確認，因標識制度正在DCFTA趨同下分階段實施。製造商應在投放市場前向主管的喬治亞能源／標準機構確認生效的標籤格式、語言、生效日期及任何登記數據庫。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in force — appliance energy labelling is being introduced under Georgia's EU-approximated energy-labelling legislation; the exact label format, refrigerator entry-into-force date, and any product-database registration must be confirmed against current Georgian secondary legislation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia is introducing an EU-aligned A-to-G appliance energy label under DCFTA approximation. The Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label cannot be reused; an EU-aligned label generated from an IEC 62552-based EEI recalculation, in Georgian, is needed. Whether an EPREL-style registration applies and from what date should be confirmed against current Georgian secondary legislation before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚正在DCFTA趋同下引入欧盟对齐的A至G器具能效标签。中国1至5级能效标识不可复用；须采用基于IEC 62552的EEI重新计算生成的、格鲁吉亚语的欧盟对齐标签。是否适用EPREL式登记及自何日起适用，应在投放市场前对照现行格鲁吉亚二级立法确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞正在DCFTA趨同下引入歐盟對齊的A至G器具能效標籤。中國1至5級能效標識不可複用；須採用基於IEC 62552的EEI重新計算生成的、喬治亞語的歐盟對齊標籤。是否適用EPREL式登記及自何日起適用，應在投放市場前對照現行喬治亞二級立法確認。
